name: WatchGuard Firebox
description: WatchGuard Firebox Management API for managing firewall policies, address lists, and security services via WatchGuard Cloud

actions.name: List Firewall Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all firewall policies configured on the Firebox

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of policies to return

actions.name: Get Firewall Policy
actions.description: Retrieve a specific firewall policy by ID

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: ID of the policy to retrieve

actions.name: Create Firewall Policy
actions.description: Create a new firewall policy on the Firebox

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Policy configuration including name, type, source, destination, services, and action

actions.name: List Blocked Sites
actions.description: Retrieve the blocked sites list configured on the Firebox

actions.name: Add Blocked Site
actions.description: Add an IP address, subnet, or hostname to the blocked sites list

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Blocked site entry including type (ip, subnet, hostname) and value

actions.name: Remove Blocked Site
actions.description: Remove an entry from the blocked sites list

parameters.name: entry_id
parameters.description: ID of the blocked site entry to remove

actions.name: List Aliases
actions.description: Retrieve all alias objects (address groups) on the Firebox

actions.name: Get System Info
actions.description: Retrieve Firebox system information including model, firmware, and serial number

actions.name: Get Traffic Monitor
actions.description: Retrieve real-time traffic monitoring data from the Firebox

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return
